description: A linguistic expression record — a unit of text at any granularity (document, transcript, paragraph, sentence, word, morpheme). Expressions may be nested via parentRef and anchored into media via mediaRef and anchor.

id.description: Stable identifier for this expression (e.g. UUID).

kindUri.description: AT URI of a record that formally defines the expression kind.

kind.description: Expression granularity: document, transcript, paragraph, sentence, word, morpheme, etc.

text.description: The full text content of this expression.

language.description: BCP 47 language tag (e.g. en, fr, zh-Hant).

mediaRef.description: AT URI of the media record this expression derives from (e.g. a video or audio record).

sourceRef.description: AT URI of the source record from which this expression was produced (e.g. a transcript record).

parentRef.description: AT URI of the parent expression, for nested structure (e.g. sentence within paragraph).

anchor.description: Position of this expression within its parent text or media.

features.description: Linguistic features associated with this expression.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this record was created.
